debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
⊢ Continuous g''

      have h2 : Continuous (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) := 
        ContDiff.continuous (ContDiff.nth_partial h1 (by norm_num : 1 ≤ 1))

    · apply Continuous.comp

        have : ContDiff ℝ 0 (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) := by

    apply Continuous.comp _ g₀_diff.continuous

unfold interpolated_deriv2
    apply continuous_finset_sum
    intro i _
    apply continuous_finset_sum
    intro j _
    apply Continuous.mul
    · apply Continuous.mul
      · exact continuous_const
      · exact continuous_const
    · have : ContDiff ℝ 1 f := fc.of_le (by norm_num)
      have h1 : ContDiff ℝ 1 (nth_partial j f) := by
        unfold nth_partial
        exact ContDiff.fderiv (fc) (by norm_num) (EuclideanSpace.single j 1)
      have h2 : Differentiable ℝ (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) := by
        unfold nth_partial
        have : ContDiff ℝ 1 (nth_partial j f) := h1
        exact (this.differentiable (by norm_num)).fderiv_apply (EuclideanSpace.single i 1)
      have h3 : Continuous (nth_partial i (nth_partial j f)) := h2.continuous
      have h4 : Continuous (fun t => (1 - t) • x + t • y) := by fun_prop
      exact h3.comp h4
